patterns: Tell me about SRM Faculty of Science and Humanities
What are the features of FSH SRM
Describe the Faculty of Science and Humanities
responses: SRM Faculty of Science and Humanities (FSH) is one of the core faculties of SRMIST, offering programs in Computer Applications, Commerce, English, Mathematics, and other disciplines.
FSH focuses on academic excellence, research, and holistic student development through workshops, projects, and industry exposure.
The Faculty of Science and Humanities provides undergraduate and postgraduate programs across multiple streams including Science, Arts, and Commerce.

Our faculty conducts interdisciplinary seminars, workshops, and hackathons to encourage innovation and collaboration among students.
Various technical, cultural, and academic events are hosted every semester at SRM FSH — including expert talks, symposiums, and hands-on training sessions.

patterns: does the college have library facility
responses:
SRM University Library aims to serve the needs of students, faculty and staff members of the library. The library at SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRMIST) in Kattankulathur is a large, modern, and well-equipped facility. It is one of the premier university libraries in India, with a floor area of 1.5 lakh sq ft.

patterns: How can I apply for SRM FSH?
Tell me about the admission process at SRM Faculty of Science and Humanities
What are the eligibility criteria for SRM FSH?
How do I get admission in SRM FSH?
responses: You can apply for SRM FSH through the official SRMIST admission portal: https://www.srmist.edu.in/admissions
The admission process includes submitting an application online, meeting eligibility criteria, and possibly attending counseling or interviews.
For detailed eligibility and procedure, visit the official SRMIST admission page for FSH programs.

patterns: What is the intake for SRM FSH B.Sc and BCA courses?
How many students are admitted in SRM FSH each year?
Tell me the seat capacity for FSH undergraduate programs
Number of seats in SRM FSH for B.Com, B.Sc, BCA
Student intake for SRM FSH courses
responses: For the academic year, SRM FSH admits approximately: B.Sc – 120 seats, B.Com – 180 seats, BCA – 120 seats per program.

SRM Faculty of Science and Humanities has a structured intake per course to maintain quality education. Detailed intake info is available on the official website: https://www.srmist.edu.in/faculty-of-science-humanities/
The FSH programs at SRMIST have fixed seat capacity per course to ensure personalized attention and effective learning.

patterns: What is the dress code at SRM FSH?
do we have to wear uniform
responses: SRM FSH students are expected to follow the SRMIST dress code which includes formal or semi-formal attire. Uniforms may be required for certain programs or events.

The Faculty of Science and Humanities encourages student participation through committees like the Academic Council, Library Committee, and Events Committee.
For detailed roles and current members of FSH committees, you can check the official SRMIST FSH page: https://www.srmist.edu.in/faculty-of-science-humanities/

patterns: Is ragging allowed in SRM FSH?
Tell me about anti-ragging rules in SRM Faculty of Science and Humanities
What is SRM FSH policy on ragging?
How does SRM FSH prevent ragging?
responses: Ragging is strictly prohibited at SRM FSH and SRMIST under the UGC and AICTE regulations.
SRM FSH has a zero-tolerance policy towards ragging. Any complaints can be reported to the Anti-Ragging Cell of the university.

patterns: what scholarships does the college provide
responses:
SRM Institute of Science and Technology (SRMIST) in Kattankulathur offers a wide range of scholarships based on merit in entrance exams, academic performance, and special categories. The scholarships can provide waivers of 25% to 100% on tuition fees.For specific details, including the application process for the next academic year, prospective students can contact the admissions office at SRMIST Kattankulathur.
